response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video content as promotional material that repeats three times. 2. Defined the four main scene types: Informational, Teaser, Performance, and Outro based on the first cycle. 3. Used search to confirm the song title 'Hyper Jumpin'' by hololive 5th Generation, composed by Panda Boy. 4. Extracted and formatted the lyrics. 5. Mapped the scenes for the first iteration. 6. Verified all fields and ensured strict formatting.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the hololive 5th Generation 'ne-po-ra-bo Live Re:VISION' event, featuring informational slides, an atmospheric teaser, and a vocal performance of the song 'Hyper Jumpin''. The video consists of three identical loops of this entire sequence. The lyrics for 'Hyper Jumpin'' were identified through search and analysis.

scenes.description: Informational slides and promotional text for the 'ne-po-ra-bo Live Re:VISION' event.
Atmospheric forest scene with night sky, displaying introductory text '聖なる夜', '4つの星が、ひとつになるとき', '奇跡が、はじまる。'.
VTubers Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Shishiro Botan, and Yukihana Lamy perform and dance to the song 'Hyper Jumpin''.
